task_instructions: For any TDS, identify series, item codes, main searchable fields, long-tail spec values, method descriptions, structure images, and unmatched content.
Always return strict JSON with exactly six top-level buckets: series, items, params, category_params, spec_values, unmatched.
If content cannot be matched to an existing dictionary key with high confidence, send it to unmatched with a reason instead of guessing.
field_mapping_guidance: Series-level description, features, and applications belong in series.
Item matrix information belongs in items.
Measured technical metrics belong in spec_values.
Standard test explanations belong in params[].method_html.
table_patterns: Item matrix tables usually combine code with thickness or color.
Performance tables are often grouped by condition, substrate, or environment.
negative_rules: Do not map legal disclaimers into business data.
Do not map generic marketing slogans into parameter values.
few_shot_examples: Pluck Testing should become a method card plus related parameter values, not a main item field.
Static Shear at 70C usually becomes spec_values with conditions and units.
